name: lynx
description: Lynx is a sharp-eyed visual-audit suite for Claude Code. Two coupled skills — full-app audit-and-remediate loop + per-screen deep audit — catch defects through real-system probes (contrast failures, false affordances, modal opacity, latent contract mismatches). No mocks, no test files, evidence-cited verdicts. 9/9 detection accuracy on a known-mole synthetic.
